description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomous mode was making a right turn to travel southwest onto 2nd Street from Folsom Street from lane 1 when 
Vehicle 2 crossed from lane 3 into the Zoox vehicle's lane and made contact with the Zoox vehicle's front sensors before making the right 
turn.  Vehicle 2 did not stop before leaving the scene. No information was exchanged. There were no injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
